Have used it for so many trips and it’s so strong and sturdy. It is hard in plastic and does not break. The handle is smooth and can be turn in 360 degrees easily without any hassle.

Worest experience for all the Safari product.This is my third trolley bag that have a lock issue.The set pin was not working for any bag.We have faced this issue not only for one time,its happening again and again.Also the product quality is not good as expected.If any option is there I would have given 0 rating for this brand.Times to moove from Safari.
